full_prompt: Design the Roll Cage (roll hoop + supporting primary structure) of a single-seat off-road all-terrain vehicle (ATV) collegiate benchmark. Material: AISI 1018 DOM steel or equivalent per standard table with yield 365 MPa, ultimate 440 MPa, Young's modulus 205 GPa, Poisson 0.29, density 7850 kg/m^3. Primary tubing is minimum 1.00 inch (25.4 mm) OD x 0.120 inch (3.05 mm) wall, or 1.25 inch OD x 0.065 inch wall with equivalent Roll-Cage Equivalent Material (RCEM) bending stiffness EI >= 387 lb-in^2 and bending yield strength >= 19450 lb (86 kN). Secondary members minimum 1.00 inch OD x 0.035 inch wall. Vehicle wheelbase must be between 60 and 72 inches; overall width must not exceed 64 inches. Single-seat cockpit must accommodate a 95th-percentile male with helmet, with at least 3 inch (76 mm) clearance from helmet to nearest cage tube. Engine is a 10 hp OHV single-cylinder spec powerplant, engine mount must transmit engine reaction torque to the frame. Load cases: (LC1) front impact: 6 g (15000 N on 250 kg vehicle+driver) applied axially at the front bumper plane with rear wheels fixed; (LC2) side impact: 4 g (10000 N) lateral at driver's shoulder height; (LC3) roll-over: 3 g vertical + 2 g lateral simultaneous at the top of the main hoop; (LC4) rock impact: point load 2500 N at the side impact structure mid-span; (LC5) fatigue: 1 million cycles of +/- 2 kN vertical hits at the front lower A-arm pickup representing endurance course. Pass/fail: (R1) max von Mises below yield 365 MPa across LC1-LC4, (R2) cage intrusion toward helmet envelope under LC1-LC3 below 50 mm, (R3) RCEM bending-strength equivalence >= 19450 lb at all primary tubes, (R4) fatigue alternating stress at welds below 100 MPa (BS 7608 Class D), (R5) total cage mass below 40 kg. Deliverables: STEP, SES (Structural Equivalency Spreadsheet) analog, FEA per load case, fatigue summary, and mass report.
short_prompt:
Design the Roll Cage (main hoop + supporting primary structure) of a single-seat off-road all-terrain vehicle for a collegiate Baja-style benchmark. Material class: AISI 1018 DOM steel. Qualify to a Roll-Cage Equivalent Material (RCEM) bending-strength/stiffness gate (EI >= 387 lb-in^2, bending strength >= 19,450 lb i.e. 86 kN) for primary tubes, BS 7608 Class D at the welds for fatigue, and 1.5 FoS on yield for static cases.

Envelope: wheelbase 60-72 in, width <= 64 in, helmet-to-cage clearance >= 3 in (76 mm) for a 95th-percentile male + helmet, primary tube >= 1.00 in OD x 0.120 in wall.

Load cases.
- LC1 front impact: 6 g (15,000 N on 250 kg vehicle + driver) axial at the front bumper plane, rear wheels fixed.
- LC2 side impact: 4 g (10,000 N) lateral at shoulder height.
- LC3 roll-over: 3 g vertical + 2 g lateral simultaneous at the top of the main hoop.
- LC4 rock impact: 2500 N point load at the SIS mid-span.
- LC5 fatigue: 1 million cycles of +/- 2 kN vertical at the front lower A-arm pickup.

prompt.title: Off-road ATV collegiate roll cage
prompt.brief: Single-seat off-road ATV roll cage per collegiate RCEM bending-strength gates.
